productTitle: MikroTik CRS317-1G-16S+RM Switch – 16x SFP+ 10G Fiber Rackmount
name: MikroTik CRS317-1G-16S+RM
title: MikroTik CRS317-1G-16S+RM
title_extended: MikroTik CRS317-1G-16S+RM Switch – 16x SFP+ 10G Fiber Rackmount
short_description: Smart Switch, 1 x Gigabit LAN, 16 x SFP+ Cages, Dual Core 800MHz CPU, 1GB RAM, 1U Rackmount Passive Cooling Case, Dual Power Supplies
description: Smart Switch, 1 x Gigabit LAN, 16 x SFP+ Cages, Dual Core 800MHz CPU, 1GB RAM, 1U Rackmount Passive Cooling Case, Dual Power Supplies

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Routing & Segmentation
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik CRS317-1G-16S+RM is a Layer 3 switch designed for efficient routing and network segmentation, making it ideal for connecting diverse network segments or VLANs. Paired with its 10GbE capability, it ensures fast data transmission rates, making it suitable for data-intensive tasks. Whether you're overseeing a data center, managing high-volume computational tasks, or streaming high-definition content, this switch provides both the speed and routing functionality needed for optimal performance.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Port Configuration
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik CRS317 is not just an advanced networking solution with its 16 SFP+ ports designed for 10GbE connections, catering to the needs of growing businesses; it also brings in enhanced protection and true professional performance for demanding networks with new features like the hardware-based Spanning Tree Protocol (MSTP) and Link Aggregation (LACP). Additionally, the switch includes a 1GbE copper port for efficient network management. Its versatility makes it suitable for both small offices and large data centers, providing the speed and reliability required for cloud computing and real-time analytics.

detailed_description.heading: Multitasking Capabilities
detailed_description.text: Equipped with the efficient 98DX8216 chipset and a dual-core processor running at 800 MHz, the CRS317 ensures swift operations and promises optimal multitasking capabilities, especially being coupled with its abundant 1 GB of RAM. This robust memory allocation guarantees the seamless handling of extensive data traffic and ensures seamless execution of complex security measures.

detailed_description.heading: Amplified Reliability
detailed_description.text: This device is equipped with dual redundant power supplies, a feature often seen in rigorous environments such as data centers and medical facilities. Boasting two independent power sources, its reliability is amplified. If one source encounters an issue, the second ensures uninterrupted functioning. This configuration not only extends the equipment's longevity but also manages power inconsistencies effectively. For enhanced protection, each power supply connects to distinct circuits. While the device primarily relies on passive cooling, its fans engage in higher temperatures to guarantee optimal operation.

detailed_description.heading: Operational Versatility
detailed_description.text: The "Dual boot" functionality in the MikroTik CRS317 provides users with the option to select between two distinct operating systems based on their specific needs. Users can opt for RouterOS, renowned for its comprehensive routing features, or SwOS, tailored for switch-specific functions. This feature allows users to precisely configure functions ranging from basic port-to-port forwarding to more complex adjustments in MAC and IP headers.

comments.name: Dr.
comments.text: Very good product for its price but the fans are very annoying. Config is easy. This is not my first switch of MikroTik and if you change the fans to noctua it is amazing piece of hardware.
